title: ericoides inclusum
intro: Ericoides inclusum, also known as the Wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. It contains methyl salicylate, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Wintergreen make it beneficial for relieving pain and reducing inflammation, particularly in the treatment of arthritis, headaches, and sore muscles. Wintergreen can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
